title: Mainz, Rhineland-Palatinate — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mainz, Rhineland-Palatinate: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mainz is a city in Rhineland-Palatinate with a population of 218,000. The Gutenberg city on the Rhine, capital of Rhineland-Palatinate, a Roman-founded wine capital with a lively carnival tradition and media hub.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
